title: From Netherite To Draconite
description: A Minecraft mod that introduces new features to go beyond netherite and elevating the overall experience, including powerful armor, new ore, new sword, shovel, hoe etc... all centered around the Draconite resource.
body:
# **From Netherite To Draconite**

![FNTD Banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/900fc3369d602c7c981861b7389095333eebd330.png)

From Netherite To Draconite offers new features, including a brand new armor set, a new rare ore, and diverse weapons/tools, all connected to the Draconite resource.


## Key Features of the Mod

• **Powerful Draconite Armor:** Equip yourself with a Draconite armor set, elevating your defenses to unprecedented levels and granting you the strength to face even the most powerful enemy.

<details>
<summary>Craft Armor</summary>

### Draconite Helmet

![Draconite Helmet](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/8631cf702917060b4296280d2a9d551e251c8c2a.png)


### Draconite Chestplate

![Draconite Chestplate](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/5fccacb01681947bfff4b9c6bb0e675a19cb6e29.png)


### Draconite Leggings

![Draconite Leggings](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/2ecb67c3554ecbd9239fa8ac36ec56e5741b94ba.png)


### Draconite Boots

![Draconite Boots](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/763d5461043707139f456e17ab76b38b07a5c430.png)

</details>

• **New Draconite Resource:** Discover the rare and coveted Draconite resource, hidden deep within the Overworld, and unlock its incredible potential.

• **Draconic Arsenal:** Expand your weaponry with a range of Draconic tools and weapons, including swords, shovels, hoes, and more, each infused with the power of Draconite.

<details>
<summary>Craft Tools & Weapons</summary>

### Draconite Sword

![Draconite Sword](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/955a92fdd7d7f9c3202800a64a5007b05176e07f.png)


### Draconite Axe

![Draconite Axe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/5ec4dcc2e8d485995a74e35a66a37931cdcded8e.png)


### Draconite Pickaxe

![Draconite Pickaxe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/846cb561abc95c130652a3fef13a9a8d032db6f3.png)


### Draconite Shovel

![Draconite Shovel](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/a246c0bb0b9a745eb62f51096913ac155a488f13.png)


### Draconite Hoe

![Draconite Hoe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uNdmsJVg/images/4fdf030ee76896104c919d4adb45f181a96fb3ed.png)

</details>

This is just the beginning! I've got more cool stuff in mind to add and improve in future versions of this mod. Stay tuned for updates!
